LoanExtractionSchema.description: Schema for extracting loan details from a document.

name.description: The name of the loan or lender
name.title: Name

principal.description: The original principal amount of the loan
principal.title: Principal

interest_rate.description: The annual interest rate as a percentage (e.g., 12.0)
interest_rate.title: Interest Rate

installment_amount.description: The monthly or per-period installment amount
installment_amount.title: Installment Amount

duration_months.description: The total duration of the loan in months
duration_months.title: Duration Months

start_date.description: The start date of the loan in YYYY-MM-DD format
start_date.title: Start Date

currency.description: The ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., PHP, USD, SGD)
currency.title: Currency

lender.description: The name of the lending institution
lender.title: Lender

reasoning.description: Brief explanation of the extraction results
reasoning.title: Reasoning

LoanExtractionSchema.title: LoanExtractionSchema

StatementExtractionSchema.description: Structured extraction of multiple transactions from a bank statement.

account_name.description: The name of the account or institution
account_name.title: Account Name

statement_period.description: The date range covered by the statement
statement_period.title: Statement Period

reasoning.description: Brief explanation of the extraction results
reasoning.title: Reasoning

StatementExtractionSchema.title: StatementExtractionSchema

TransactionExtractionItem.description: A single transaction extracted from a bank statement.

date.description: The transaction date in YYYY-MM-DD format
date.title: Date

description.description: The transaction description or merchant name
description.title: Description

amount.description: The transaction amount (negative for expenses, positive for income/deposits)
amount.title: Amount

TransactionExtractionItem.title: TransactionExtractionItem

description: Polymorphic response for unified document processing.

document_type.description: The classified type of the document

ocr_telemetry.description: Technical metadata about the extraction process (char counts, method)
ocr_telemetry.title: Ocr Telemetry

title: UnifiedDocumentResponse
